Let me do the complete content migration for all 4 clients — mapping their original es.json to the template structure, then push to main:

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code": "from hermes_tools import terminal, write_file
import json, os

# Read ALL original content
originals = {}
clients = ["superspuma", "dayah-litworks", "villamayor-asociados", "maiyu-atelier"]

for name in clients:
    r = terminal(f"cat /tmp/{name}/content/es.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'", timeout=5)
    lines = r["output"].split("\n")
    if "|" in lines[0]:
        lines = [l.split("|", 1)[1] if "|" in l else l for l in lines]
    try:
        originals[name] = json.loads("\n".join(lines))
    except:
        originals[name] = {}
    print(f"Read {name}: {len(originals[name])} top-level keys")

# Now build complete es.json for each client, mapping ALL their content
def map_content(o, site_name, tagline, meta_desc, wa_phone, wa_link):
    """Map original client content to template es.json structure"""
    
    # Handle navigation — different formats
    nav = o.get("navigation", o.get("site", {}))
    if not isinstance(nav, dict) or "items" not in nav:
        nav = {"businessName": site_name, "ctaText": "WhatsApp", "ctaHref": wa_link, 
               "items": [{"label": "Inicio", "href": ""}]}
    
    # Handle home — different structures
    home = o.get("home", {})
    if not home:
        # villamayor/maiyu have flat structure
        hero = o.get("hero", {})
        home = {
            "seo": {"title": site_name, "description": meta_desc},
            "hero": {
                "headline": hero.get("title", tagline),
                "subheadline": hero.get("subtitle", ""),
                "ctaPrimaryText": hero.get("ctaText", hero.get("cta", "Ver más")),
                "ctaPrimaryHref": hero.get("ctaLink", "/tienda"),
                "ctaSecondaryText": hero.get("secondaryCta", "WhatsApp"),
                "ctaSecondaryHref": hero.get("secondaryCtaLink", wa_link),
            },
            "stats": {"title": "Estadísticas", "items": hero.get("stats", [])},
            "features": {"title": "Servicios", "items": o.get("services", {}).get("items", o.get("features", {}).get("items", []))},
        }
    
    # Handle products — different schemas
    products = o.get("products", o.get("productos", o.get("home", {}).get("products", [])))
    # Normalize product schema: ensure all have id, slug, name, price (number)
    normalized = []
    for i, p in enumerate(products if isinstance(products, list) else []):
        normalized.append({
            "id": p.get("id", i + 1),
            "slug": p.get("slug", p.get("name", f"product-{i}").lower().replace(" ", "-")),
            "name": p.get("name", ""),
            "price": float(p.get("price", 0)) if not isinstance(p.get("price"), (int, float)) else p.get("price", 0),
            "image": p.get("image", ""),
            "description": p.get("description", ""),
            "features": p.get("features", []),
            "featured": p.get("featured", False),
            "new": p.get("new", False),
        })
    
    # Handle FAQ
    faq = o.get("faq", [])
    if isinstance(faq, dict):
        faq = faq.get("items", [])
    
    # Handle testimonials
    testimonials = o.get("testimonials", [])
    
    # Handle categories
    categories = o.get("categories", o.get("home", {}).get("catalogo", {}).get("categories", []))
    # Normalize
    cats = []
    for i, c in enumerate(categories if isinstance(categories, list) else []):
        if isinstance(c, str):
            cats.append({"id": c.lower(), "name": c, "description": "", "icon": "📦"})
        else:
            cats.append({
                "id": c.get("id", c.get("name", f"cat-{i}").lower().replace(" ", "-")),
                "name": c.get("name", ""),
                "description": c.get("description", ""),
                "image": c.get("image", ""),
                "icon": c.get("icon", "📦"),
            })
    
    # Handle about/nosotros
    nosotros = o.get("nosotros", o.get("about", {}))
    if not nosotros:
        nosotros = {
            "title": f"Sobre {site_name}",
            "subtitle": tagline,
            "story": [tagline],
            "values": []
        }
    if isinstance(nosotros, dict) and "values" not in nosotros:
        nosotros["values"] = nosotros.get("values", o.get("site", {}).get("values", []))
    
    # Handle contact
    contacto = o.get("contacto", o.get("contact", {}))
    if not contacto:
        contacto = {"title": "Contacto", "subtitle": "Contactanos", "whatsapp": wa_phone}
    if isinstance(contacto, str):
        contacto = {"title": "Contacto", "subtitle": "Contactanos", "whatsapp": wa_phone}
    
    # Handle blog
    blog = o.get("blog", {"title": "Blog", "subtitle": "", "categories": [], "posts": []})
    if isinstance(blog, dict) and "posts" not in blog:
        blog["posts"] = []
    if isinstance(blog, list):
        blog = {"title": "Blog", "subtitle": "", "categories": [], "posts": blog}
    
    # Handle footer
    footer = o.get("footer", {
        "description": tagline,
        "columns": [
            {"title": "Enlaces", "links": [{"label": "Inicio", "href": ""}, {"label": "Tienda", "href": "/tienda"}]},
        ],
        "copyright": f"© 2026 {site_name}"
    })
    
    # Handle envio
    envio = o.get("envio", {
        "title": "Envío",
        "subtitle": "Consultá por las zonas de entrega",
        "points": [{"icon": "🚚", "title": "Envío Nacional", "description": "Realizamos envíos."}],
        "cta": "Consultar por WhatsApp"
    })
    
    # Handle promos
    promos = o.get("promociones", {"title": "Promociones", "subtitle": "", "promotions": []})
    if not promos or not isinstance(promos, dict):
        promos = {"title": "Promociones", "subtitle": "", "promotions": []}
    
    return {
        "siteName": o.get("siteName") or o.get("site", {}).get("name", site_name),
        "businessName": o.get("businessName") or o.get("site", {}).get("name", site_name),
        "tagline": tagline,
        "metaDescription": meta_desc,
        "navigation": nav,
        "home": home,
        "products": normalized,
        "categories": cats,
        "envio": envio,
        "faq": faq,
        "testimonials": testimonials,
        "contacto": contacto,
        "nosotros": nosotros,
        "promociones": promos,
        "blog": blog,
        "footer": footer,
    }

# Configuration per client
configs = {
    "superspuma": {
        "site_name": "Superspuma",
        "tagline": "Colchones y Sommiers en Paraguay desde 1976",
        "meta_desc": "Colchones y sommiers de alta calidad en Paraguay. Fabricación propia desde 1976.",
        "wa_phone": "[REDACTED_PHONE]",
        "wa_link": "https://wa.me/[REDACTED_PHONE]",
        "primary": "#1B3A5C",
        "domain": "superspuma.paragu-ai.com",
        "whatsapp": "[REDACTED_PHONE]",
    },
    "dayah-litworks": {
        "site_name": "Dayah LitWorks",
        "tagline": "Book Cover Design · Autora Amazon Prime Reading",
        "meta_desc": "Diseño de portadas de libros y maquetación interior. Autora Amazon Prime Reading. Servicios profesionales de diseño editorial.",
        "wa_phone": "[REDACTED_PHONE]",
        "wa_link": "https://wa.me/[REDACTED_PHONE]",
        "primary": "#C75B39",
        "domain": "dayah.paragu-ai.com",
        "whatsapp": "[REDACTED_PHONE]",
    },
    "villamayor-asociados": {
        "site_name": "Villamayor & Asociados",
        "tagline": "Estudio Jurídico en Paraguay",
        "meta_desc": "Estudio jurídico especializado en derecho corporativo, civil y laboral en Paraguay.",
        "wa_phone": "[REDACTED_PHONE]",
        "wa_link": "https://wa.me/[REDACTED_PHONE]",
        "primary": "#1B2A4A",
        "domain": "villamayor.paragu-ai.com",
        "whatsapp": "[REDACTED_PHONE]",
    },
    "maiyu-atelier": {
        "site_name": "Maiyu Atelier",
        "tagline": "Crochet Hecho a Mano con Amor",
        "meta_desc": "Amigurumis, accesorios y decoración en crochet. Hecho a mano en Paraguay.",
        "wa_phone": "[REDACTED_PHONE]",
        "wa_link": "https://wa.me/[REDACTED_PHONE]",
        "primary": "#D4869C",
        "domain": "maiyu.paragu-ai.com",
        "whatsapp": "[REDACTED_PHONE]",
    },
}

# Apply to each client
for name in clients:
    cfg = configs[name]
    orig = originals[name]
    mapped = map_content(orig, cfg["site_name"], cfg["tagline"], cfg["meta_desc"], cfg["wa_phone"], cfg["wa_link"])
    
    # Write to the migration dir
    target = f"/tmp/final-{name}"
    write_file(f"{target}/content/es.json", json.dumps(mapped, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
    
    print(f"\n{name}: {len(mapped['products'])} products, {len(mapped['categories'])} categories, {len(mapped['faq'])} FAQ, {len(mapped['blog']['posts'])} blog posts")

print("\nContent mapping complete for all 4 clients")
"}

{"code": "from hermes_tools import terminal, write_file
import json

# 1. Fix maiyu products — add slug based on name
with open("/tmp/final-maiyu-atelier/content/es.json") as f:
    es = json.load(f)

for p in es.get("products", []):
    if not p.get("slug"):
        p["slug"] = p["name"].lower().replace(" ", "-").replace("/", "-")

write_file("/tmp/final-maiyu-atelier/content/es.json", json.dumps(es, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))

# 2. Build and push ALL 4
clients = [
    ("superspuma", "#1B3A5C", "[REDACTED_PHONE]"),
    ("dayah-litworks", "#C75B39", "[REDACTED_PHONE]"),
    ("villamayor-asociados", "#1B2A4A", "[REDACTED_PHONE]"),
    ("maiyu-atelier", "#D4869C", "[REDACTED_PHONE]"),
]

for name, primary, whatsapp in clients:
    target = "/tmp/final-" + name
    
    # Update layout
    with open(target + "/app/layout.tsx") as f:
        layout = f.read()
    layout = layout.replace("superspuma.paragu-ai.com", name + ".paragu-ai.com" if name != "superspuma" else "superspuma.paragu-ai.com")
    layout = layout.replace("[REDACTED_PHONE]", whatsapp)
    write_file(target + "/app/layout.tsx", layout)
    
    # Build
    r = terminal("cd " + target + " && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5", timeout=120)
    ok = "Compiled successfully" in r["output"]
    print(f"{name}: {'OK' if ok else 'FAILED — ' + r['output'][:100]}")
    
    if ok:
        # Push to main
        terminal("cd " + target + " && git add -A && git commit -m 'migrate to template: 15 pages, full content' 2>&1 | tail -1", timeout=10)
        terminal("cd " + target + " && git remote add client https://github.com/Ai-Whisperers/" + name + ".git 2>/dev/null; git push client main:template-migration --force 2>&1 | tail -1", timeout=30)
        print(f"  Pushed to {name}")

print("\nAll done")
"}
